# GitLab Work Item Template

Use this for sprint execution when GitLab is the work board.

## Summary

One sentence describing the artifact.

## Area

- Course
- Research
- Events
- Partners
- Community
- Platform

## Scope

- Files or repositories touched:
- Expected output:
- Reviewer:

## Evidence

- Official sources:
- Internal docs:

## Done When

- [ ] Artifact exists.
- [ ] Markdown checks pass where applicable.
- [ ] Public claims are sourced.
- [ ] GitHub/Jira links are recorded if needed.
- [ ] Bitbucket mirror is checked if code/docs changed.
